task_objective: Build a robust, type-safe Python wrapper for Ludusavi CLI.
design_decisions: Hybrid typing policy with total=False for volatile metadata
Command prefix discovery (Explicit Path -> PATH -> Flatpak)
Relaxed error model: Fail only on non-zero exit code, capture stderr as warnings
results: Successfully implemented 16 methods covering 100% of Ludusavi CLI surface area. Passed all 21 test cases and verified against real-world fixtures.
